steps.title: Use the stated goal
steps.content: The student wants to identify the title of Zora Neale Hurston's first published short story. The effective choice must name that title directly.

steps.title: Name the title
steps.content: A gives only the year, C gives the year and publication, and D gives only the genre of the work. The matching choice names "John Redding Goes to Sea" as the first published short story. The answer is B.
